---
title: "My Posts"
sidebar: false
---

# My Posts

This page is where I share short notes on **life, learning, and well-being**.

Alongside my coursework and projects, I also enjoy writing about experiences and ideas that shape how I study, work, and live.

## Topics I Want to Share

### Travel Notes
Short reflections from countries, cities, and places I visit.

### Well-Being
Thoughts on balance, motivation, healthy routines, and student life.

### Healthy Snack Ideas
Simple and practical snack ideas that are easy to prepare and fit a busy schedule.

## Coming Soon

I plan to share posts in these areas over time.
